$comment: Prompt set for the 2026-05-10 current-vs-slicing experiment (issue #71). These prompts are anchored to the committed examples/demo-repo corpus so the experiment is reproducible in a fresh checkout.

prompts.text: Explain how password policy login creates a tenant session. Include where tenant context enters and where the session is persisted.
Trace what runs the monthly billing close and how execution reaches the monthly revenue report builder.
A customer was billed but never got a receipt email. Which code path should you inspect first, and which modules participate in sending the receipt?
Finance says the monthly revenue snapshot looks wrong. Trace how the report is built and where invoice data flows into the final snapshot.
If a PR changes InvoiceService.sendInvoiceReceipt, what adjacent code paths should a reviewer inspect for receipt delivery or monthly close regressions?
If a PR changes TenantContext or auth login wiring, which modules are most at risk of breaking and why?
What can break if PasswordPolicy.allows changes its public contract? List direct callers and downstream behavior that depends on it.
What can break if the TenantContext shape changes? Identify the files and workflows that would need to update.
